2.q: Everted membrane vesicles prepared from E. coli cells carrying nhaH exhibited Na+/H+ as well as Li+/H+ antiporter activity, which was pH-dependent with highest activities at pH 8.5–9.0 and at pH 8.5, respectively.

3.q: ORF4 ... encode ... a glycine betaine aldehyde dehydrogenase (BADH) ... it is well established that the last two proteins are involved in the biosynthesis of glycine betaine with choline as precursor
